'''Sevv Sunb''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] accountant. He started his career managing the finances of a group entertainers. Sunb helped them expand into the smuggling business, to earn the band more money. However, they were caught in the act and their ship was impounded. This made Sunb find a new employer. He ended up working for [[Vurrha Chur]] as the accountant in his gang, [[Vurrha's Blood]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], Sevv Snub first began his career under a traveling band of entertainers as their accountant and financier.<ref name="UA" /> With Sevv under their wing, the band met with good success, eventually bolstering enough to include [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] in their line of work.<ref name="UA" /> However, their prosperity was short lived. While traveling on a [[Spice/Legends|spice]] delivery mission, the band's ship was captured.<ref name="UA" />
Soon after this event, Sevv found new work in the hands of a criminal organization known as [[Vurrha's Blood]], led by [[Vurrha Chur]].<ref name="UA" /> Over time, the Sullustan proved his worth as a bookkeepers position, providing much success for the gang.<ref name="UA" />

==Personality and traits==
Snub was 1.4 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall, and was considered short for his [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="UA" /> He had [[Color/Legends|black]] eyes and was considered to be overweight by many.<ref name="UA" /> Known to be skittish, he was regarded as having a high-pitched voice and a nervous laugh. Nevertheless, he proved his skill at his occupation.<ref name="UA" />

==Skills and abilities==
Sevv Snub was deemed to be a good-shot, although he disliked fighting, and would almost always try to avoid it if possible.<ref name="UA" />

==Equipment==
Snub chose to wear large jackets, and was particularly fond of gaudy colors.<ref name="UA" /> As he disfavored fighting, he chose to only carry a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], concealing it with his large jacket on his hip.<ref name="UA" />

==Sources==
